title: ipv6_addr.h: unnecessary stdio.h include
description: firmware/bridge-zephyr/subsys/lichen/ipv6_addr.h includes <stdio.h> at line 26, but the header does not use any stdio functions. snprintf is used in ipv6_addr.c, which already includes the header. Remove <stdio.h> from ipv6_addr.h to reduce transitive dependencies and improve compile times.
